case_title: HILL, DAMON C. VS VAN SYCKLE, PAUL

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28389, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO DEFENDANT VAN SYCKLE-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN- UNABLE TO FORWARD. (NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, DAMON C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN SYCKLE, PAUL $395.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $435.50, PLAINTIFF MAY NEGOTIATE DEFENDANT'S PRIOR PAYMENT OF $340, WHICH SHALL BE CREDITED AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT. NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT VAN SYCKLE, PAUL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, DAMON C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VAN SYCKLE, PAUL JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28389 ON 08/03/2007. NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.
